subcodes.first_line: O thou eloquent leaf, attracted by the fragrances of God, stirred by the breeze wafting from the gardens of bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایتها الورقه الناطقه المنجذبه بنفحات الله المهتزه من نسیم هب من ریاض موهبه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @firmness in the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
